parameters.query: UPDATE gpmd_slots SET participant_id = (SELECT id FROM gpmd_participants WHERE phone=$1 LIMIT 1), reservado_at=NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM gpmd_slots WHERE fecha=$2 AND franja=$3 AND participant_id IS NULL ORDER BY numero_slot LIMIT 1) RETURNING id, fecha, franja, hora_inicio, hora_fin
UPDATE gpmd_participants SET estado='factura_pendiente', updated_at=NOW() WHERE phone=$1
